commit.message:
feat(layout): sidebar colapsable con secciones por rol

Rediseño completo del AdminLayout:
- Sidebar fijo con w-64 expandido / w-[68px] colapsado (toggle desktop)
- Drawer móvil con backdrop blur y transición slide
- Navegación en secciones: Principal, Clínico, Personas, Configuración
- Visibilidad por rol: isAdmin/isBranchManager muestra Usuarios y Config
- Perfil de usuario con avatar gradiente y badge de rol al fondo
- Tooltips en modo colapsado, active-class con borde izquierdo azul
- Top bar mobile con avatar e icono hamburger

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(dashboard): panel de métricas con KPIs, gráficos y top médicos

Dashboard en /admin (raíz del panel):
- 5 KPI cards: citas hoy, citas período, pacientes, médicos activos,
  tasa de asistencia con semáforo de color
- Donut: distribución de citas por estado
- Line: tendencia diaria (30/7/1 días según selector)
- Bar horizontal: citas por especialidad médica
- Tabla: top 5 médicos por citas en el período
- Selector Hoy/Semana/Mes y filtro de centro (solo admin)
- AdminLayout rediseñado: topbar sticky, nav con iconos, hamburger mobile
- Citas movidas a /admin/citas (ruta admin-appointments)
- Instala chart.js ^4.5.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix all critical issues + add generic charts + comprehensive tests

Bug fixes:
- SVG renderer: support categorical/string x-axes (bar, pareto, forecast,
  inventory, capacity, main effects all render correctly now)
- SVG renderer: handle dict traces (box plot, contour/heatmap)
- yield_from_cpk_curve: fix marker — now renders as scatter point, not
  broken index-0 marker
- Remove vegalite.py stub (was raising NotImplementedError — worse than absent)

New generic chart builders (charts/generic.py):
- bar(), grouped_bar(), stacked_bar()
- line(), multi_line()
- area()
- pie() (stored as dict trace for flexible rendering)
- gauge() with threshold zones
- sparkline() (tiny inline — no axes, no labels)

Previously untested exports now tested:
- interaction_plot()
- box_plot()
- residual_histogram()

Edge case handling:
- Empty data → "No data" SVG (not crash)
- Single data point → renders correctly
- Mismatched x/y lengths → renders available data
- Normal probability < 3 points → graceful empty

86 tests. 0.20s. Zero dependencies. All chart types render in both
Plotly and SVG renderers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Step 1352: HIER replicates at 1.64× (not 7.8×). 4/10 vs 3/10 non-zero.

Chain mean 7.53e-5 vs flat 4.59e-5. Modest improvement, not the 7.8× from 1351.
1351 inflated by lucky draw (Game B eff²=0.005487). Click games 0/10 on fresh seeds.
Type entropy completely flat (2.079 at all checkpoints). No action learning.
HIER is marginally better than flat through structural keyboard coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add missing Home link to portfolio page menu

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: switch from Hermes Agent to ZeroClaw runtime

ZeroClaw is a Rust-based agent runtime with pre-built Docker images
(ghcr.io/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw:latest), eliminating the Python/pip
build issues. Key changes:

- Paperclip Dockerfile is now minimal (Node.js + npm only)
- ZeroClaw runs as separate container using official Docker image
- Two-container architecture: Paperclip ↔ ZeroClaw via WebSocket
- Paperclip uses built-in @paperclipai/adapter-openclaw-gateway
- Agent workspace uses IDENTITY.md + SOUL.md + config.toml format
- ZEROCLAW_WORKSPACE env var replaces HERMES_HOME
- All 58 tests passing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

가사 프롬프트 출력 규칙 강화 — [] 영어 전용

- 가사를 제외한 모든 프롬프트/메타데이터는 [] 안에 영어로만 출력
- VOCAL PROFILE, SECTION, VOCAL_PROMPT, LAYER, Texture 전부 영어 강제
- 가사 본문만 브라켓 밖, 선택된 언어로 작성
- 예시: [SECTION: Verse 1] (O) / [SECTION: 1절] (X)

updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: パスキーボタンのトリガー属性名を修正

Go の html/template は data- プレフィックスを除去してから属性タイプを
判定するため、data-onclick-trigger が JS コンテキストとして扱われ
値に余分なクォートが挿入されていた。

data-onclick-trigger / data-onload-trigger を data-fn-click / data-fn-load
に変更し、正しいテキストコンテキストで値がレンダリングされるよう修正。

また registration テンプレートを全グループ対応に改善し、2ステップ登録フロー
(Step1: メール入力 / Step2: パスワードまたはパスキー) を正しく表示するよう修正。

docs: restructure CLI pages with accordions/steps, remove key fingerprint

- Managing variables: group into Decrypt & Encrypt + Quick Edits (accordions)
- Setup & auth: collapse key/pin/diagnostics into accordions, remove key fingerprint docs
- Register Accordion, Steps components as default MDX components
- Remove `vars key fingerprint` CLI subcommand and add changeset

fix: substituir ports por expose no docker-compose para deploy no Coolify (#4)

O Coolify usa Traefik como proxy reverso e acessa o container pela rede
Docker interna, sem precisar de binding de porta no host. Usar 'ports'
causava conflito com outras aplicações já rodando no servidor.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01KSnUZEuoUF4BiejQCu4TeY

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

ForgeViz v0.1.0 complete: Python spec + JS renderer + SVG renderer

JS Renderer (js/forgeviz.js — ~350 lines, ~15KB):
- Renders ChartSpec JSON to SVG in the browser
- Line, scatter, bar, area, step chart types
- Hover tooltips on all data points
- Click events (forgeviz:click CustomEvent with x, y, index, name)
- Copy to clipboard (SVG)
- Download SVG and PNG (with configurable scale)
- Responsive resize via ResizeObserver
- Three themes: svend_dark, light, print
- Zero dependencies. No Plotly. No D3. No npm.

Python spec layer (5 chart modules):
- control: SPC control charts with zones, OOC markers, spec limits
- distribution: histogram with normal overlay, box plot
- effects: DOE main/interaction/Pareto/normal probability
- scatter: scatter + regression, Pareto
- time_series: forecast vs actual, inventory position, capacity loading

Renderers:
- plotly.py: → Plotly JSON (backward compat, no plotly import)
- svg.py: → pure Python SVG string (zero dependency server-side)
- vegalite.py: stub

Integration: from_spc_result() converts forgespc output directly.

31 Python tests. Zero dependencies (Python AND JS).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Step 1349: SIGNAL — 3/10 draws non-zero RHAE. Baseline alive on fresh seeds.

Chain mean RHAE = 4.59e-5. 3/30 games reached progress (10% reachability).
Seeds 13440-13444 were unusually hard — fresh seeds show the substrate works
on a fraction of the game pool. Non-zero draws: 2 (0.000243), 4 (9e-6), 5 (0.000207).
MLP+TP entropy baseline IS alive. The question is: can 1350 improve reachability?

Step 1345: Adam RHAE=0.0 on same hard games as TP. NOT credit depth.

Deliberation (internal simulation before acting) resurfaces as the path forward.

* fix(cli): address greptile review — decrypt safety, owner validation, HKDF salt

- Wrap decrypt calls in try-catch in diff, check, export, run commands
  so owner sub-keys gracefully skip master-encrypted values
- Validate owner name in pin create (alphanumeric, hyphens, underscores only)
- Use AST parsing instead of string matching for re-encryption detection
- Use application-specific HKDF salt "dotvars-owner-key-v1" per RFC 5869

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cli): allow key rotation with owner entries, warn and invalidate

Instead of blocking rotation when owner PINs exist, warn the user
that owner PINs will be invalidated and require confirmation. After
rotation, owner PINs need to be re-created via `vars pin create`.

* refactor: deduplicate KeyScope type — single definition in @dotvars/node

feat: add broad-secret-env rule to detect secrets in workflow/job-level env

Detects ${{ secrets.* }} and ${{ github.token }} in workflow-level and
job-level environment variables, where they are exposed to all steps
including third-party actions. Step-level env is allowed as the
recommended pattern. Markers point at the specific sub-expression
(e.g., secrets.TOKEN) rather than the whole ${{ }} span.

commit.message:
fix: add editable Status field to invoice edit form

The edit form now shows a Status dropdown (Pending / Paid / Cancelled)
so a paid or cancelled invoice can be corrected without needing to
delete and recreate it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

add convergent member discovery via outbox member lists

Each participant publishes their known members to their own outbox.json
on Drive. When polling other members' outboxes, new members are
auto-discovered and added locally. This enables group conversations
without requiring n² link exchanges — only 2 per new member.

Also adds /join route redirect, improves join screen UX (conversation
naming, confirm flow, member list display), and removes legacy types.

commit.message:
Hard cap: never recommend offering above asking price

Recommended Offer is now capped at asking price in both the optimal
layout engine and the projected economics section. If strike math
says we can pay more than ask, the offer = asking price (already a
good deal). Shows checkmark "at ask" when capped.

Override: set site.offerAboveAskReason in Firebase to allow above-ask
recommendation with documented justification (e.g., competitive bid).

commit.message:
Step 1344: KILL — 0/15 games, 0/5 draws. 1343 RHAE was luck.

Compression anomaly: cr=0.36-0.46 on harder games vs 0.08 on easy (1337-1343).
92% compression was game-specific, not substrate property.
MLP+TP baseline is RHAE-dead across broader sample.
11 experiments this session, all RHAE=0 except one lucky draw.

Add detail modals to admin Workers and Jobs tables

Workers modal (click any row):
- Avatar, full name, email, location, nationality, joined date
- Profile completion %, profile/user IDs
- Full skills list, bio/about section, work history
- Applications list with job title, business, status, date

Jobs modal (click any row):
- Title, business name, status badge, job type, pay, resort
- Posted/start/end dates, positions available, job ID
- Perks display (accommodation, ski pass, visa, meals)
- Full description and requirements
- Applicants mini-list with name, status badge, date
- Action buttons: View Public Listing, Remove Listing

Both match the existing Businesses modal pattern (same width,
card layout, gradient header, close button, info grid).

fix: partial Zenodo verification — dSTORM data confirmed, clearance claim blocked by 45 GB npy files

Downloaded DAT_clustering.csv and steady_state_DAT_*.csv from Zenodo record 18046987.
dSTORM: VS > DS clustering confirmed (mean 43.2% vs 29.9%) but p-value and sample
sizes mismatch paper claim (p=0.029 two-tailed vs claimed p=0.012; n=13 DS / n=12 VS
vs claimed n=12/n=13). Clearance claim (400 vs 200 ms) requires sim_result_*.npy
(9.1 GB × 5 files) — not downloaded. Steady-state equilibrium panel reproduced:
20nm clusters show 1.9× elevated tonic DA vs unclustered, consistent directionally.

Steps 1341+1343: kills + first non-zero R2-compliant RHAE from control

1341 KILL: curiosity/EMA surprise = entropy on ARC. Action-blind model.
1343 KILL: AC-ENC concentrated on wrong actions, WORSE than random.
  But MLP-TP control RHAE=0.0001 on Game A — first non-zero R2-compliant.
  MBPP char_embed novelty_var=0.004 approaching signal threshold.
Finding confirmed: bridge is shared representation, not action selection.
Step 1344 specced: baseline RHAE distribution across 5 draws.
